title: Build Your First Anydocs Site with Codex
description: A sample docs project that simulates a developer using Codex with the Anydocs MCP server.

render.markdown:
# Build Your First Anydocs Site with Codex

This sample project simulates a developer using Codex to:

- connect to `@anydocs/mcp`
- initialize an Anydocs docs project
- create and update pages through the MCP workflow
- organize navigation and build a previewable docs site

If you already installed the Anydocs MCP server in Codex, treat this site as a compact end-to-end reference.
render.plainText: Build Your First Anydocs Site with Codex. This sample project simulates a developer using Codex with @anydocs/mcp to initialize a docs project, edit pages, organize navigation, and build a previewable site.
